headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.unsplash.com https://images.unsplash.com; font-src 'self' data: https://*.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self';
